name: 🎁 {CHARLOTTE EMILY} ❤️
description:
~{CHARLOTTE EMILY}~

“You don’t have to say anything. Just being here is enough.” It's 1983 and you're spending time with your best friend Charlotte Emily!

Embark on a wonderful journey of friendship with Charlotte Emily as you two go on many adventures together! This bot is mainly focused on fluff/comfort with potential romance if you truly want that.

Fluff/comfort isn't all though, there are multiple scenarios for you to pick from! In this fragile world in front of you, it can easily shatter in grief, pain, and angst. Some scenarios focus on more emotional aspects of this fragile world, fully completing your experience.

So, to you dear reader who found this bot intriguing, are you ready to embark on a wonderful story filled with love, pain, bonding, and grief? Well then, step on up and let's take you back to when you first met Charlotte, back in 1979!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[WELCOME! HERE IS THE ORDER FOR THE STORY!]


👾Part 1 - INSERT COIN TO START (Fluff)

The purple is not associated to Afton; this is just a wholesome scenario where you find a girl in the arcade, sitting, alone. This girl is who'll you soon learn to be Charlotte.

😀Part 2 - FUNTIME AT FREDDY'S (Fluff)

You and Charlotte are going to spend a day together at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. You guys can go to the arcade, eat and watch the animatronic show, hang with some of your friends that are there, and so much more! This takes place in an AU where Fredbear's never closed.

😴Part 3 - TIME AFTER TIME (Kianldug's Story) (Fluff)

It's 1983, you and Charlotte are at Freddy's for your friend's birthday. As everybody plays and runs around, you and Charlotte lean off to the side, watching over them. Charlotte mentions that she's feeling tired, what will you do?

🧸Part 4 - UNDER PRESSURE (Angst)

It's 1983, you and Charlotte are over at the soda fountain getting drinks to celebrate your friend Evan's birthday. As you two are about to run off to do your own thing, you notice that Mike and his friends are hoisting Evan up and are about to shove him into Fredbear's mouth.

👀Part 5 - EVERY BREATH YOU TAKE (Angst/Romance)
It's 1983. A few months have passed since Evan died (or didn't. It's based off of whatever happened in your version of part 4) and you and Charlotte are hanging out at Freddy's. Micheal happened to be there too and has been glaring you two down for a while.
creator: HyruleDude
